# Known private flag (ioc ip join)

**Dataset**: `gx_03_ioc_ip` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IOC enrichment — correlate live events against an indicator IP lookup via join. Known private flag. the `is_*` address helpers return a boolean (false, not null, on non-match); `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = gx_03_ioc_ip | alter is_priv = is_known_private_ipv4(indicator) | alter ip_class = if(is_priv = true, "private", "public") | comp count() as n by ip_class | sort desc n
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 1). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
